response.justification: The candidate lacks critical required qualifications: no evidence of C programming for UNIX embedded systems, no Linux kernel modification experience, no exposure to embedded networking security technologies like MACsec or 802.1X, and no Japanese language proficiency — all mandatory for this role. His experience is heavily skewed toward web/mobile stacks and DLang/TypeScript, with no embedded firmware or switch product background.
strengths: Strong full-stack development experience across multiple languages and platforms
Demonstrated ability to build and maintain complex open-source systems
Active contributor to testing, CI/CD, and developer tooling infrastructure
concerns: No proven C or embedded Linux kernel development experience
Zero mention of network security protocols (MACsec, 802.1X, etc.) or switch firmware
No Japanese language proficiency — a hard requirement for the role

key_factors.factor: Lack of Networking Security Domain Knowledge
